next_action: Open docs/days/day010.md. Day 009 was completed on 2026-03-19 after drafting docs/result/day009.md, which explains typing and function signatures as tools for expressing clear function interfaces, connects dict/tuple/Union/Optional/Any/object/Callable/TypedDict back to interface boundaries, and ends with three true-or-false checks.
